The Collective

Build the
Immutable.

We are a distributed, pseudonymous collective of engineers building the world's first mathematically infallible inheritance protocol. We operate asynchronously, transparently, and without borders.

Radical Autonomy

  • Open DocumentationAll architectural decisions, research, and technical debt are documented publicly.
  • Asynchronous by DefaultNo mandatory standups. No surveillance. We measure cryptographic output and code quality, not hours online.
  • Pseudonymity AcceptedWe do not require your real identity. Apply, work, and be compensated under a verified PGP pseudonym.

The Mandate

"Human trust scales poorly. Mathematics scales infinitely. We are replacing the reliance on lawyers and centralized databases with deterministic cryptography."

— DWP Core Contributors

Open Positions.

$180k - $250k USDC / yr

$150k - $200k USDC / yr

Distributed Systems Architect (IPFS)

InfrastructureFull-TimeRemote (Global)
$160k - $220k USDC / yr

Don't see a fit?

We are always looking for exceptional engineers who understand Zero-Knowledge proofs, Rust, or decentralized infrastructure.

Submit your PGP / GitHub
